titleStmt.title: SII 40.214: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 214. (A.R. No. B. 259 of 1933.) Aminbāda, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a rock on the Ammavārikoṇḍa.
This is dated Śaka 1298, Nala, Māgha, Pūrṇima.

Records the construction of the temple, Prākāra and gōpura of the temple Mūlaṅgūramma (a family deity of the king) and also gifted three villages viz., Veḍidaramu, Mūlaṅgūru and China-Palakalūru in Kōṭabhūmi for providing services in the temple by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakābdamulu sahasramunu ninnūṁṭa toṁbadi yenimidiyagu bhavya saṁkhyāṁ galigi yōppārada
nalavatsaraṁbuna māghamāsamu pū¨rṇimā dinamuna viśvōttaruṁḍḍanna vēmabhūpāluṁḍḍu damakulasvāminikamṛta
kiraṇarēkhāvataṁsaku śrīmūlaṁ gūrammakakhila jaganmātakaṁgaraṁgabhōgaṁsiddhikai dhārvōsi yiccu grāmamu
lu mūṁḍu śrī kōṭa bhūmiyaṁdu veḍidaramu mūlaṁ gūraṁccina palakalūru . dānakhacarēṁdruṁḍā
caṁdratārakamugā . kramapariprāpta sāmrājyasiṁhāsanādhyāsiyai yakhilarājādhirāja paramēśva
ruṁḍā jipā¨rdhuṁḍḍu pedakōmaṭanna vēmādhīśuṁḍa¨rti pinataṁḍri yanavēmabhūpati sēsina dha¨rma
mu¨rjītamugāṁga . nī grāmamulu mūṁṭinella kālaṁbu bhōgaiśvarya sa¨rvamānyataṁ nosage . naṁbikaku mūla
ṁgūra makakhila jananikadiṁgaṭṭiṁce bhuvanamōhanamugāṁga . sa¨rvalōkōnnatinabhraṁkaṣaṁbulaina guḍiyu
ṁbrākāravalayaṁbu gōpuramulu .
lines are damaged
mūlaṁgūramnamūlaṁgūru sīmācihnalu tū¨rppunaku ce¨rllateruvu dakṣiṇānaku guvva
guṁṭṭibāśinavāṁgu . paḍumaṭiki ce¨rllōniguṁḍu Uttarānaku Aṇnasaṁmūḍi Uttarapu
kommu . pinapalkalūrikindū¨rppunaku bālliṟāyinni Āṟāticāyamulaku ḍekoṁḍasagaṁ . dakṣiṇānaku
nallapāṭikiṁbōyina deruvunnuboggulagaḍḍunnu . paḍumaṭiki yellapavāṁgunu . mēṭidāpalugō
Digital edition of SII 40.214 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
